info.title: EfBootstrap
info.description: A .NET Global CLI Tool to bootstrap production-ready backend projects using Entity Framework Core. Automates folder structure creation, EF Core package installation, and database scaffolding.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: EF Core Project Bootstrapper - Automate your EF Core project setup

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a new EF Core project with folder structure, packages, and database scaffolding

commands.name: scaffold
commands.description: Scaffold database entities and DbContext (run separately or retry after failure)
